calendar.matters:
Ex Parte Petition For Osc For Change Of Name.
Off Calendar Dec-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as an Ex Parte for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. Not reported.
Petitioner: Katherine Ann Cvengros, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter was on calendar of 6-1-04. Plaintiff was not present, nor was anyone present to object to the name change.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Katherine Anne Taylor.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-01-2004 Off Calendar
